chunks.heading: Front matter
chunks.notes: Ingested front matter of Sword World RPG - Complete Edition. Created source page for the complete rulebook and two concept pages: role-playing-game and game-master. All pages cite the front matter section (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7). No entities were touched in this chunk.

chunks.heading: Books Related to Sword World RPG
chunks.notes: Written the main source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-books-related' and three concept pages: 'replay-collections', 'scenario-collections', and 'races-sword-world'. Key claims covered include the different types of supplementary books for Sword World RPG, their purposes, limitations, and the characteristics of the four main races (dwarf, grassrunner, elf) in the game's setting. The pages touch on important entities like the Duda RPG Replay Collection series and the concept of ability scores.

chunks.heading: 1.3 Skills
chunks.notes: Ingested Chapter 1.3 on Skills from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition. Wrote source page for the chapter and updated concept pages for Half-Elf and Adventurer Skills. Key entities touched: half-elf, changeling, adventurer skills (fighter, thief, sage, bard, ranger, sorcerer, shaman, priest, dark priest, dragon priest). The half-elf page includes information on their characteristics, lifespan, and upbringing, while the adventurer skills page details the various classes available to adventurers.

chunks.heading: 1.4 Character Creation (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-character-creation' and updated concept pages 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-races' and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-ability-scores'. Key claims covered include race selection process, ability score determination, starting skills and experience points, and character details. Entities touched include humans, dwarves, grassrunners, elves, half-elves, and various ability scores.

chunks.heading: 1.4 Character Creation (part 2)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter 1.4 source page for character creation and updated three related concept pages: race, ability score, and skill. The chunk covered character creation including race selection, ability scores, starting skills, and character details. Key entities touched include human, dwarf, grassrunner, elf, and half-elf races, as well as ability scores and skill acquisition.

chunks.heading: 2.3 Checks
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for 2.3 Checks and updated related concepts: baseline score and target score. The chunk covered the core mechanics of success rolls, including baseline scores, target scores, automatic success/failure, bonuses/penalties, and difficulty checks. Key entities touched include Ducard II (used in examples) and the game master's role in determining target scores. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-2-3, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-baseline-score, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-target-score.

chunks.heading: 2.7 Resistance Rolls
chunks.notes: Written the chapter page for 2.7 Resistance Rolls and three related concept pages: resistance roll, life force resistance roll, and mental power resistance roll. Key claims covered include the calculation of baseline scores for resistance rolls using adventurer level plus ability bonuses, the distinction between life force and mental power resistance rolls, and examples of these rolls in action. Entities touched include Ducard II as an example character.

chunks.heading: 3.4 Movement and Actions
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for Movement and Actions (Chapter 3-4) and updated related concepts: agility and withdrawal from engagement. The chapter covers movement options (full, normal, stand still) and their action restrictions, combat skills (fighter, thief, ranger), weapon combat rules, and projectile restrictions. Key entities touched include character creation elements, combat mechanics, and ability scores.

chunks.heading: 4.5 Attacks From Characters Against Monsters
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page for 4.5 Attacks From Characters Against Monsters and updated related concepts: attack power, evasion points, and strike power. These pages cover key combat mechanics from the chunk, including hit checks, damage calculation, and defense points.

chunks.heading: 4.9 Unconscious and Death Checks
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for 4.9 Unconscious and Death Checks. Updated the life force resistance roll concept page with new details from the chapter. Created a new concept page for death checks. All pages cite the relevant section (p. 4-51 to 4-53) from the source.

chunks.heading: 5.1.1 Types of Magic
chunks.notes: Wrote the chapter page for 5.1.1 Types of Magic and updated related concepts: rune masters and magic spells. Key claims: There are five types of magic (ancient, spirit, holy, dark, dragon roar) each with different runes and sources; rune masters are divided into five types based on magic used; magic power = skill level + intelligence bonus; characters cannot have more than one type of holy, dark, or dragon roar magic simultaneously; spell levels range from 1-10 with higher levels requiring higher skill.

chunks.heading: 5.1.4 How to Use Magic
chunks.notes: Wrote the chapter page for "How to Use Magic" (5.1.4) and updated related concepts. Key pages created: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-5-1-4-how-to-use-magic, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-magic-power, and sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-resistible-magic. The chunk covered magic power calculation, resistible vs non-resistible magic, casting procedures for adventurers and monsters, and resistance checks.

chunks.heading: 5.1.7 Magic Expansion
chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 13/69 from 'Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (p.61-64). Created or updated three pages: 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-magic-expansion' (concept), 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-magic-contraction' (concept), and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-5-1-7-magic-expansion' (source). Key claims covered include magic expansion types (targets, area, volume, duration, distance, damage, final score, effect), combined expansion mechanics, magic contraction types (area, volume, duration, power decrease, effect), and magic types (damage, target score, counters, mind, physical ability, weapon enhancement, non-removable, curse, detection, focus, illusion). The pages cover the core mechanics of how rune masters can manipulate magic effects through expansion and contraction, with detailed examples and tables for area and size expansion.

chunks.heading: 5.1.10 How to Read Magic Details
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for 'How to Read Magic Details' (5.1.10) and two concept pages: 'illusion magic' and 'ritual magic'. Updated existing pages with new cross-references. Key claims covered include: how to read magic details, types of senses affected by illusion magic, detection of illusions, ritual magic benefits and limitations, and how ritual bonuses stack. Entities touched: illusion magic, ritual magic, five senses, pseudo senses, magic senses, spellbook, magical catalyst.

chunks.heading: 5.1.12 Ancient Magic List (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page for the ancient magic list (5.1.12) and three concept pages: Enchant Weapon, Magic Protection, and Familiar. Key claims covered include the effects and limitations of each spell, with cross-references to the main source and other relevant pages. Entities touched include weapons, objects, creatures, and spell mechanics.

chunks.heading: 5.1.12 Ancient Magic List (part 2)
chunks.notes: Ingested Chapter 5.1.12 part 2 of Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, detailing 4th, 5th, and 6th level ancient magic spells. Updated the existing Magic Protection concept page and created a new Physical Enchant concept page. The chapter source page was updated to reflect the full list of spells. Key entities touched: Magic Protection, Physical Enchant, Bone Servant, Lightning, Levitation, Counter Sense, Conceal Self, Shape Change, Sense Aura, Tongue, Paralyze, Fireball, Location, Apport, Illusion, Suppress Elemental, Skeleton Warrior, Sense Lie, Translate, Vision, Flight, Blizzard, Acid Cloud, Analyze Enchantment, Geas, Create Undead, Create Device, Create Buau Zombie, and See-Through.

chunks.heading: 5.1.12 Ancient Magic List (part 3)
chunks.notes: Written the 5th part of the ancient magic list chapter (4th-9th level spells), and updated related concepts: Seal Enchantment, Wraith, and Control Weather. Key entities touched include magic spells, magical power, and the ancient kingdom period.

chunks.heading: 5.1.12 Ancient Magic List (part 4)
chunks.notes: Written the 4th level ancient magic list chapter page and updated related concepts. Key claims: Petrify spell turns targets to stone, Rune Shield blocks magic, and shaman skill requires specific restrictions for use. Entities touched: Petrify, Rune Shield, shaman skill, spirit magic. Pages written: 3 (including source chapter and 2 concepts).

chunks.heading: 5.1.14 Spirit Magic List (part 1)
chunks.notes: Ingested chapter 5.1.14 "Spirit Magic List" from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition. Created source page for the chapter and updated related concept pages: shaman skill and spirit magic. Key entities touched: Wind Voice, Snare, Destruction, Purification, Firebolt, Brownie, Will-O-Wisp, Water Screen, Confusion, Shade, Fanaticism, Forget, Hold, Invisibility, Water Breathing, Control Spirit, Healing, Mute, Water Walking, Sink, Sleep, Tunnel. The shaman skill page was updated to include information about spirit magic spells and restrictions.

chunks.heading: 5.1.14 Spirit Magic List (part 2)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-5-1-14-spirit-magic-list-part-2' detailing spirit magic spells from 5th to 7th level. Updated the 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-spirit-magic' concept page with comprehensive information on spirit magic types, spell levels, and key spells. Updated the 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-shaman-skill' concept page to include additional information on the shaman skill's usage and abilities beyond spirit magic casting.

chunks.heading: 5.1.14 Spirit Magic List (part 3)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for part 3 of the spirit magic list (5.1.14) and updated the main spirit magic concept page with new spells. Created two new concept pages for the Plant Shell and Full Control Spirit spells that were detailed in this chunk. Key entities touched: Ent/Greater Plant Spirit, Various lesser spirits. All pages cite the appropriate source material.

chunks.heading: 5.1.15 Holy Magic and the Priest Skill
chunks.notes: Written the chapter page for 5.1.15 Holy Magic and the Priest Skill, and updated related concepts: priest skill, holy magic. No new entities created. Key claims: holy magic requires faith, priests must worship one god, wicked gods are forbidden, priests have divination and vow abilities. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-5-1-15-holy-magic-and-the-priest-skill, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-priest-skill, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-holy-magic.

chunks.heading: 5.1.16 Basic Holy Magic List (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter page for 5.1.16 (Basic Holy Magic List) and updated related pages: priest-skill and holy-magic. The key claims covered include the priest skill's requirements, restrictions, and abilities, as well as the basic holy magic spells up to 7th level. Entities touched include the priest skill, holy magic, and various spells like Cure Wounds, Turn Undead, and Resurrection.

chunks.heading: 5.1.16 Basic Holy Magic List (part 2)
chunks.notes: Written the second part of the basic holy magic list chapter, and updated the reincarnation and resurrection concepts. Key entities touched: reincarnation, resurrection, save soul, call god, and others. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-5-1-16-basic-holy-magic-list-part-2.md, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-reincarnation.md, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-resurrection.md.

chunks.heading: 5.3 Spellsongs
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page for 5.3 Spellsongs and two related concept pages: Bard skill and Spellsong List. Key entities touched: bard, spellsongs, mind-type magic. No new entities created beyond existing ones in the wiki.

chunks.heading: 6.2 Thief Skill
chunks.notes: Written the thief skill chapter page (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-thief-skill) and three related concept pages: thieves' guild, lockpicking, and equipment restrictions. Key claims covered include the guild's requirements, penalties for outsiders, lockpicking tools and modifiers, and the not retriable nature of certain abilities like lockpicking. Entities touched include the thieves' guild, lockpicking tools, and various thief skill abilities.

chunks.heading: 6.4 Sage Skill
chunks.notes: Written the main 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-sage-skill' page, and related concepts 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-bard-skill' and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-monster-check'. Key claims covered include the sage skill's abilities (Monster Check, Languages, Astrology, Knowledge, Research, Treasure Appraisal, Medicines), the bard skill's abilities (Sing, Play Instrument, Languages (Spoken), Spellsongs, Folklore Knowledge), and the specific rules for Monster Check including rarity scores and success rolls. Pages written: 3.

chunks.heading: 6.6 Common Adventurer Abilities
chunks.notes: Ingested Chapter 6.6 "Common Adventurer Abilities" from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition (pages 120-125). Created a source page for the chapter and two concept pages for key skills mentioned: Folklore Knowledge and Spellsongs. The chapter covers common abilities like Riding, Swim, Ship Steering, Climb, and Jump, with detailed rules for each. Folklore Knowledge is a bard skill providing familiarity with regional myths and legends, while Spellsongs are magical songs from the ancient kingdom period. Both skills are described in detail with their mechanics and limitations.

chunks.heading: 7.2 Merchant Skill
chunks.notes: Written the merchant skill concept page, the craftsman skill concept page, the hunter skill concept page, and the chapter 7.2 source page. Key claims: Merchant skill enables trade and negotiation, Craftsman skill enables item creation and valuation, Hunter skill enables hunting and pre-processing. Entities touched: merchant, craftsman, hunter. Pages written: 4.

chunks.heading: 8.1 Experience Points
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for 4.5 Attacks From Characters Against Monsters and updated related concepts: experience points, sorcerer skill. No new entity pages created; existing pages were updated to reflect new information on skill interactions and experience point usage.

chunks.heading: 9.2 Should You Use a Target Score Check or a Difficulty Check?
chunks.notes: Written chapter page sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-9-2-target-score-vs-difficulty.md and updated target-score and difficulty-check concept pages. Key concepts covered: target score checks for actions with clear outcomes, difficulty checks for ambiguous outcomes, and the distinction between them. The chunk also introduced success roll modifiers and automatic success rules.

chunks.heading: 10.3 Surprise Attacks
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for '10.3 Surprise Attacks' and updated related concepts: 'surprise attack', 'stealthy step', and 'ranger skill'. Key claims include the mechanics of surprise attacks involving 2D rolls, monster level, and ranger skill/intelligence bonus. Entities touched include monster level, ranger skill, and thief skill.

chunks.heading: 11.2 Dark Magic (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter page for dark magic (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-11-2-dark-magic) and updated related concepts: dark priest (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dark-priest) and dark magic spells (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dark-magic-spells). Key claims covered include the nature of dark magic, the role of dark priests, and a list of basic dark magic spells from 1st to 10th level. Entities touched include dark priests, wicked gods, and specific spells like Wounds, Mental Attack, Deafness, Blindness, Poison, Control Imp, Steal Life, Curse, Create Zombie, Mesmerize, Rot, Cripple, Summon Servant, Plague, Recall Spirit, and Call God.

chunks.heading: 11.2 Dark Magic (part 2)
chunks.notes: Wrote the chapter page for 11.2 Dark Magic (part 2) and three concept pages: Evil Impulse, Berserk, and Lunatic Seed. All pages cite the source material (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.142-148). The chapter page covers special dark magic spells for Phalaris, The Nameless God of Madness, Kardis, and Mirleaf, while the concept pages focus on the key spells that demonstrate different aspects of dark magic - from impulse-based evil acts to berserk rage to controlling curses.

chunks.heading: 11.3 Dragon Roar Magic
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page for dragon roar magic (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dragon-roar-magic), and updated related concepts: dragon priest skill (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dragon-priest-skill) and dragon roar magic spells (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dragon-roar-magic-spells). Key claims covered include the nature of dragon roar magic, the dragon priest skill's acquisition and restrictions, and the various spells available including summoning, transformation, and elemental magic. Entities touched include dragon priests, dragons, reptiles, and specific spells like Fire Breath and Reborn Dragon.

chunks.heading: 11.5 Asking NPCs to Use Magic
chunks.notes: Written chapter page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-11-5-asking-npcs-to-use-magic' and updated concept pages 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dark-priest-skill' and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-rune-masters'. Key claims: NPC magic services require high-level rune masters, costs are calculated as skill level × base mental power × 20, and rituals/expansions increase costs. Entities touched: dark priest skill, rune masters, magic cost calculation. Pages written: 3.

chunks.heading: 12.2 Rules for Poison, Illness and Infection (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, Chapter 12.2 on poison, illness, and infection. Updated the concept pages for poison and illness. No entities were touched directly in this chunk.

chunks.heading: 12.2 Rules for Poison, Illness and Infection (part 2)
chunks.notes: Ingested Chapter 12.2 of Sword World RPG - Complete Edition on poison, illness, and infection. chunks.heading: 13.1 Types of Monsters
chunks.notes: Written the main monster types source page (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-monsters) and three concept pages: spirits, daemons, and undead. These cover the key monster categories discussed in the chunk. The pages integrate the specific details about each monster type's characteristics, abilities, and interactions as described in the text (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.170-172).

chunks.heading: 13.2.1 How to Read the Monster Catalog
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for Chapter 13.2.1 "How to Read the Monster Catalog" and updated related concepts: Monster Level, Rarity, and Intellect. These pages explain key data points in the monster catalog including how monster level indicates strength, how rarity affects identification difficulty, and how intellect levels determine monster behavior and abilities. The concepts were integrated into the existing monster catalog page and sage skill page.

chunks.heading: 13.2.2 Fae
chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 41/69 from 'raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (Section 13.2.2 Fae, pages 176-180). Wrote 4 pages: concept 'fae' and entities 'pixie', 'fairy', 'pooka'. Key claims: Fae are generally friendly but avoid interaction; pixies use invisibility and pranks; fairies use 3rd level spirit magic; pookas shapeshift into forest animals. Entities touched: pixie, fairy, pooka, featherfolk (mentioned but not detailed), mermen (mentioned but not detailed), imps, goblins, dark elves (mentioned but not detailed). Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-fae, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-pixie, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-fairy, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-pooka.

chunks.heading: 13.2.4 Spirits
chunks.notes: Updated the spirit magic concept page with additional spells and details from the chapter. Created a new source page for the spirit magic list. No other pages were updated or created as the chunk focused on the spirit magic system itself.

chunks.heading: 13.2.5 Titans
chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 43/69 from 'raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (section 13.2.5, pages 185-187). Wrote the chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-13-2-5-titans' and 3 concept/entity pages: 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-mad-spirit-of-life', 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-valkyrie', and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-giants'. Key claims covered include the mad spirit of life's age-shifting effects, valkyrie's spells (Valkyrie Javelin, Fanaticism), and various titan monsters with their unique abilities and characteristics. The pages touch on entities like mad spirit of life, valkyrie, and giants.

chunks.heading: 13.2.6 Mythical Beasts and Magical Beasts (part 1)
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-13-2-6-mythical-beasts-and-magical-beasts' and three entity pages: 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-satyr', 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-medusa', and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-ceiling-hanger'. chunks.heading: 13.2.6 Mythical Beasts and Magical Beasts (part 3)
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-13-2-6-mythical-beasts-and-magical-beasts-part-3' and updated concept pages 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-humbaba-curse' and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-dragon-types'. chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 56/69 from 'raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (p.234-234). chunks.heading: 13.6 Handling Monster Special Abilities
chunks.notes: Written a new source page for Chapter 13.6 on handling monster special abilities, and updated two concept pages: mental power resistance and special attacks. The source page covers all the special attack types that require mental power or life force resistance rolls, including detailed rules for magic, hypnotism, gaze/ray attacks, possession, curses, screams, roars, fire breath, poison, parasitism, disease, strangling, capture, entangling, swallowing whole, bloodsucking, acid, corrosion, stealing mental power, and iron corrosion. The concept pages provide conceptual overviews of mental power resistance and special attacks in the context of monster encounters.

chunks.heading: 14.1 Treasure and Rewards in Sword World
chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 58/69 from 'raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (p.241-242). Wrote source pages for chapters 14.1, 14.2, and 14.4 covering treasure types, reward calculations, and magical item lists. Updated concept page for 'adventurer's shop'. Key entities touched: Alecrast, ancient kingdom, gamels, adventurer's shops, magical items, treasure appraisal. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-14-1-treasure-and-rewards, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-14-2-adventure-treasure-and-reward-amounts, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-14-4-magical-item-list, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-adventurer-s-shop.

chunks.heading: 14.4 Magical Item List (part 1)
chunks.notes: Ingested Chapter 14.4 "Magical Item List" from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition. Created source page for the chapter, and concept pages for Magical Items, Treasure Appraisal, and Magical Weapons. Key entities touched include various magical weapons like Magic Sword (+1/2/3), Undead Ruler, Van Blade, Crusher, Sea Slayer, Shy Blade, Stone Statue, Twisted Sling, and others. The chunk provided detailed information on item rarity, appraisal, enchanters, and base trade prices for a variety of magical items.

chunks.heading: 14.4 Magical Item List (part 2)
chunks.notes: Wrote the chapter source page for Magical Item List (part 2) and updated related concepts: shield and magical item. Key claims include detailed properties of shields, cloaks, and accessories, with specific rarities, enchanters, forms, required strengths, and base trade prices. Entities touched include various magical items such as shields, cloaks, earrings, bracelets, and amulets. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-14-4-magical-item-list-part-2, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-shield, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-magical-item.

chunks.heading: 14.4 Magical Item List (part 3)
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-14-4-magical-item-list-part-3' and updated concept page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-magical-item' with detailed information on magical items, their rarities, enchanters, forms, required strength, base trade prices, and specific powers. Key entities touched include Guard Glove, Candlestick of Infinite (Un)Luck, Crystal Orb of Clairvoyance, and others. The pages reflect the content of the provided chunk covering magical items from the Sword World RPG Complete Edition.

chunks.heading: 16.1 Combat in Which Monsters Roll Dice
chunks.notes: Written source page for chapter 16.1 "Combat in Which Monsters Roll Dice" and three concept pages: "Weapon Modifiers", "Armor Modifiers", and "Projectile Bonus Damage". The chunk introduced optional rules for monster dice rolling in combat, weapon and armor modifiers, and projectile damage calculations. Key entities touched include attack points, evasion points, strike points, defense points, critical targets, and various weapon types.

chunks.heading: 16.5 Combat Options
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-16-5-combat-options' and two concept pages: 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-projectile-range-extension' and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-grapple'. Key claims covered include optional combat rules for grapple, projectile range extension, and various attack methods like charge, snipe, mow down, ram, and area aim. Entities touched include weapons, combat actions, and game mechanics.

chunks.heading: 16.7 Throwing Multiple Darts or Daggers
chunks.notes: Ingested chunk 64/69 from 'raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf' (p.268-273). Wrote source page for chapter 16.7 'Throwing Multiple Darts or Daggers' and updated concept pages for 'Throwing Multiple Darts or Daggers' and 'Holding Weapons in Both Hands'. Key claims: Multiple dart/dagger throwing requires same weight, strength limit, and incurs penalty based on number thrown; characters with weapons in both hands have three attack options with specific penalties; ambidextrous characters have different penalties. Entities touched: dominant hand, ambidextrous, attack power penalties.

chunks.heading: 17.2 Lost Spells
chunks.notes: Written the chapter source page for 17.2 Lost Spells and updated related concepts. Key pages created: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-17-2-lost-spells.md, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-lost-spells-concept.md, and sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-monster-magic-power.md. The chunk covered lost spells, their acquisition methods, usage restrictions, and monster magic power rules.

chunks.heading: 18.3 Rules for Destroying Structures
chunks.notes: Written the main chapter page for 'Rules for Destroying Structures' (sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-chapter-18-3-rules-for-destroying-structures) and two concept pages: 'Fire Weapon Magic' and 'Spirit Wall'. The chunk covered structure strength tables, material-specific rules, and special cases for different materials including paper, wood, brick, stone, iron, ice, and vegetation. It also detailed the handling of Spirit Walls with specific examples for Gnome, Frau, and Dryad types, including regeneration properties.

chunks.heading: Guide to Forcelia & Alecrast (part 1)
chunks.notes: Wrote source page for chapter 13.2.9 (Undead) and updated related entity pages for the six major gods (Pharis, Myrii, Cha Za) based on their roles in the world's creation and holy magic system. Key claims covered include the origin of gods from the Titan's body, their association with specific domains (war, fortune, sun), and their roles in the game's holy magic system. Pages written: sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-guide-to-forcelia-alecrast-part-1, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-pharis, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-myrii, sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-cha-za.

chunks.heading: Guide to Forcelia & Alecrast (part 2)
chunks.notes: Written chapter source page 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-guide-to-forcelia-alecrast-part-2' and three concept/entity pages: 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-sorcerers-guild', 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-mana-rai', and 'sword-world-rpg-complete-edition-ramliearth'. Key claims include the history and structure of the Sorcerers' Guild, the role of Mana Rai as Grand Master, and the magical nature of Ramliearth including its Unicorn Forest and druids.

chunks.heading: Charts
chunks.notes: Written source page for chapter 13.2.9 Undead. Updated the main Sword World RPG source page with a link to the new chapter page. No other pages needed updating as this was a standalone chapter.
